messages.reasoning_content:

4. ID 4: -$1000.00 on 2022-03-04 - "Purchase at Apple Store: iPhone 3GS" - sent to US122000000121212121212 (outgoing)
5. ID 5: +$10.00 on 2022-03-07 - received from GB29NWBK60161331926819 (incoming)
